description: Designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this pair of leather sandals from ganuchi is a great addition to your wardrobe. UpperWide midfoot leather strap with a padded fabric inner lining to hold the foot in place comfortablyErgonomically curved and padded leather footbed for style and all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with geometrical lugs on the forefoot and heel for enhanced grip and traction on various surfacesSlipper careUse a branded leather conditioner for the straps if necessaryDo store in direct sunlight
